title: vepris suaveolens
intro: Vepris suaveolens is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, also known as the citrus family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vepris suaveolens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Vepris suaveolens include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
